if.test: searchVO != null and searchVO.searchRentTypeCd != null and searchVO.searchRentTypeCd != '' and searchVO.searchRentTypeCd != 'ALL'
searchVO != null and searchVO.searchRegion != null and searchVO.searchRegion != '' and searchVO.searchRegion != 'ALL'
searchVO != null and searchVO.searchAmountRange != null and searchVO.searchAmountRange != '' and searchVO.searchAmountRange != 'ALL'
searchVO != null and searchVO.searchStatus != null and searchVO.searchStatus == 'CLOSE'
searchVO != null and searchVO.searchKeyword != null and searchVO.searchKeyword != ''

where.if: AND ( R.RENT_TTL LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.searchKeyword} || '%' OR R.RENT_LSTG_CN LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.searchKeyword} || '%' OR A.APT_CMPLEX_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.searchKeyword} || '%' OR A.DOROJUSO LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.searchKeyword} || '%' OR A.SIDO_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.searchKeyword} || '%' OR A.SIGUNGU_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.searchKeyword} || '%' OR A.EMD_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchVO.searchKeyword} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT R.RENT_LSTG_NO , R.RENT_TYPE_CD , NVL(RC.CODE_NAME, R.RENT_TYPE_CD) AS RENT_TYPE_NM , R.DPST_AMT , R.MTHLY_RENT_AMT , R.RENT_LSTG_CN , R.HO_NO , R.RENT_TTL , R.ANN_NO , P.TTL AS ANN_TTL
, TO_CHAR(P.RCRT_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCRT_BGNG_DT , TO_CHAR(P.RCRT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCRT_END_DT
, D.DONG_NO , D.FLOOR , D.HO , D.HO_STTS_CD , NVL(HC.CODE_NAME, D.HO_STTS_CD) AS HO_STTS_NM , D.IMAGE_NO , D.PANO_IMAGE_NO
, U.DONG_NM , U.FLOOR AS DONG_MAX_FLOOR , U.UNIT_CNT AS DONG_UNIT_CNT
, T.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE
, A.APT_CMPLEX_NO , A.APT_CMPLEX_NM , A.SIDO_NM , A.SIGUNGU_NM , A.EMD_NM , A.DOROJUSO , A.LAT_VAL , A.LON_VAL , A.UNIT_CNT , A.DONG_CNT , A.BLD_YR , A.CNSCO_NM , A.RPRSNT_IMG_FILE_NO , IMG.GOOGLE_IDS AS RPRSNT_IMG_GOOGLE_IDS , IMG.CATS AS RPRSNT_IMG_CATS
FROM RENT_LISTING R
LEFT JOIN CENTER_ANN_BOARD_POST P ON P.ANN_NO = R.ANN_NO
INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL D ON R.HO_NO = D.HO_NO
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT U ON D.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO
LEFT JOIN APT_HO_TY T ON D.HO_TY_NO = T.HO_TY_NO AND U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = T.APT_CMPLEX_NO
INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX A ON U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = A.APT_CMPLEX_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT AF.FILE_GROUP_NO
, LISTAGG(AF.GOOGLE_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY NVL(AF.FILE_SORT_ORDER, 999999) , AF.REG_DT , AF.FILE_SAVE_UUID ) AS GOOGLE_IDS
, LISTAGG( NVL(AF.CAT, 'NONE'), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY NVL(AF.FILE_SORT_ORDER, 999999) , AF.REG_DT , AF.FILE_SAVE_UUID ) AS CATS
FROM ATTACH_FILE AF WHERE AF.GOOGLE_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY AF.FILE_GROUP_NO ) IMG ON IMG.FILE_GROUP_NO = A.RPRSNT_IMG_FILE_NO
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE RC ON RC.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'RENT_TY' AND RC.CODE_NO_CD = R.RENT_TYPE_CD AND RC.USE_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE HC ON HC.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'HO_STTS' AND HC.CODE_NO_CD = D.HO_STTS_CD AND HC.USE_YN = 'Y'
ORDER BY R.RENT_LSTG_NO DESC

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM RENT_LISTING R
INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL D ON R.HO_NO = D.HO_NO
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT U ON D.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO
INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX A ON U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = A.APT_CMPLEX_NO
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE RC ON RC.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'RENT_TY' AND RC.CODE_NO_CD = R.RENT_TYPE_CD AND RC.USE_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE HC ON HC.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'HO_STTS' AND HC.CODE_NO_CD = D.HO_STTS_CD AND HC.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT R.RENT_LSTG_NO , R.RENT_TYPE_CD , NVL(RC.CODE_NAME, R.RENT_TYPE_CD) AS RENT_TYPE_NM , R.DPST_AMT , R.MTHLY_RENT_AMT , R.RENT_LSTG_CN , R.HO_NO , R.RENT_TTL , R.ANN_NO , P.TTL AS ANN_TTL
, TO_CHAR(P.RCRT_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCRT_BGNG_DT , TO_CHAR(P.RCRT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCRT_END_DT
, D.DONG_NO , D.FLOOR , D.HO , D.HO_STTS_CD , NVL(HC.CODE_NAME, D.HO_STTS_CD) AS HO_STTS_NM , D.IMAGE_NO , D.PANO_IMAGE_NO
, U.DONG_NM , U.FLOOR AS DONG_MAX_FLOOR , U.UNIT_CNT AS DONG_UNIT_CNT
, T.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE
, A.APT_CMPLEX_NO , A.APT_CMPLEX_NM , A.SIDO_NM , A.SIGUNGU_NM , A.EMD_NM , A.DOROJUSO , A.LAT_VAL , A.LON_VAL , A.UNIT_CNT , A.DONG_CNT , A.BLD_YR , A.CNSCO_NM , A.RPRSNT_IMG_FILE_NO
, IMG.GOOGLE_IDS AS RPRSNT_IMG_GOOGLE_IDS , IMG.CATS AS RPRSNT_IMG_CATS
FROM RENT_LISTING R
LEFT JOIN CENTER_ANN_BOARD_POST P ON P.ANN_NO = R.ANN_NO
INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL D ON R.HO_NO = D.HO_NO
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT U ON D.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO
LEFT JOIN APT_HO_TY T ON D.HO_TY_NO = T.HO_TY_NO AND U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = T.APT_CMPLEX_NO
INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX A ON U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = A.APT_CMPLEX_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT AF.FILE_GROUP_NO , LISTAGG(AF.GOOGLE_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY NVL(AF.FILE_SORT_ORDER, 999999) , AF.REG_DT , AF.FILE_SAVE_UUID ) AS GOOGLE_IDS , LISTAGG( NVL(AF.CAT, 'NONE'), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY NVL(AF.FILE_SORT_ORDER, 999999) , AF.REG_DT , AF.FILE_SAVE_UUID ) AS CATS
FROM ATTACH_FILE AF WHERE AF.GOOGLE_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY AF.FILE_GROUP_NO ) IMG ON IMG.FILE_GROUP_NO = A.RPRSNT_IMG_FILE_NO
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE RC ON RC.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'RENT_TY' AND RC.CODE_NO_CD = R.RENT_TYPE_CD AND RC.USE_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE HC ON HC.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'HO_STTS' AND HC.CODE_NO_CD = D.HO_STTS_CD AND HC.USE_YN = 'Y'
WHERE R.RENT_LSTG_NO = #{rentLstgNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY R.RENT_LSTG_NO DESC) AS RN
, R.RENT_LSTG_NO , R.RENT_TYPE_CD , NVL(RC.CODE_NAME, R.RENT_TYPE_CD) AS RENT_TYPE_NM , R.DPST_AMT , R.MTHLY_RENT_AMT , R.RENT_LSTG_CN , R.HO_NO , R.RENT_TTL , R.ANN_NO , P.TTL AS ANN_TTL
, TO_CHAR(P.RCRT_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCRT_BGNG_DT , TO_CHAR(P.RCRT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCRT_END_DT
, D.DONG_NO , D.FLOOR , D.HO , D.HO_STTS_CD , NVL(HC.CODE_NAME, D.HO_STTS_CD) AS HO_STTS_NM , D.IMAGE_NO , D.PANO_IMAGE_NO
, U.DONG_NM , U.FLOOR AS DONG_MAX_FLOOR , U.UNIT_CNT AS DONG_UNIT_CNT
, T.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE
, A.APT_CMPLEX_NO , A.APT_CMPLEX_NM , A.SIDO_NM , A.SIGUNGU_NM , A.EMD_NM , A.DOROJUSO , A.LAT_VAL , A.LON_VAL , A.UNIT_CNT , A.DONG_CNT , A.BLD_YR , A.CNSCO_NM , A.RPRSNT_IMG_FILE_NO
, IMG.GOOGLE_IDS AS RPRSNT_IMG_GOOGLE_IDS , IMG.CATS AS RPRSNT_IMG_CATS
FROM RENT_LISTING R
LEFT JOIN CENTER_ANN_BOARD_POST P ON P.ANN_NO = R.ANN_NO
INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL D ON R.HO_NO = D.HO_NO
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT U ON D.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO
LEFT JOIN APT_HO_TY T ON D.HO_TY_NO = T.HO_TY_NO AND U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = T.APT_CMPLEX_NO
INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX A ON U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = A.APT_CMPLEX_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT AF.FILE_GROUP_NO , LISTAGG(AF.GOOGLE_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY NVL(AF.FILE_SORT_ORDER, 999999) , AF.REG_DT , AF.FILE_SAVE_UUID ) AS GOOGLE_IDS , LISTAGG( NVL(AF.CAT, 'NONE'), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY NVL(AF.FILE_SORT_ORDER, 999999) , AF.REG_DT , AF.FILE_SAVE_UUID ) AS CATS
FROM ATTACH_FILE AF WHERE AF.GOOGLE_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY AF.FILE_GROUP_NO ) IMG ON IMG.FILE_GROUP_NO = A.RPRSNT_IMG_FILE_NO
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE RC ON RC.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'RENT_TY' AND RC.CODE_NO_CD = R.RENT_TYPE_CD AND RC.USE_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE HC ON HC.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'HO_STTS' AND HC.CODE_NO_CD = D.HO_STTS_CD AND HC.USE_YN = 'Y'
) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT A.APT_CMPLEX_NO AS aptCmplexNo , A.APT_CMPLEX_NM AS aptCmplexNm , A.DOROJUSO AS dorojuso , A.SIDO_NM AS sidoNm , A.SIGUNGU_NM AS sigunguNm , A.EMD_NM AS emdNm , A.LAT_VAL AS latVal , A.LON_VAL AS lonVal , COUNT(DISTINCT R.RENT_LSTG_NO) AS rentCount , SUM(CASE WHEN R.RENT_TYPE_CD = 'JS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS JS_COUNT , SUM(CASE WHEN R.RENT_TYPE_CD = 'PE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PE_COUNT
, MIN(CASE WHEN R.RENT_TYPE_CD = 'JS' THEN R.DPST_AMT END) AS MIN_JS_DPST_AMT , MIN(CASE WHEN R.RENT_TYPE_CD = 'PE' THEN R.MTHLY_RENT_AMT END) AS MIN_PE_MONTHLY_RENT_AMT
, MAX(R.DPST_AMT) AS MAX_DPST_AMT , MIN(CASE WHEN R.RENT_TYPE_CD = 'PE' THEN R.MTHLY_RENT_AMT END) AS MIN_MONTHLY_RENT_AMT FROM RENT_LISTING R INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL D ON R.HO_NO = D.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT U ON D.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX A ON U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = A.APT_CMPLEX_NO WHERE A.LAT_VAL IS NOT NULL AND A.LON_VAL IS NOT NULL AND R.ANN_NO IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.APT_CMPLEX_NO , A.APT_CMPLEX_NM , A.DOROJUSO , A.SIDO_NM , A.SIGUNGU_NM , A.EMD_NM , A.LAT_VAL , A.LON_VAL

SELECT R.RENT_LSTG_NO , R.RENT_TYPE_CD , NVL(RC.CODE_NAME, R.RENT_TYPE_CD) AS RENT_TYPE_NM , R.DPST_AMT , R.MTHLY_RENT_AMT , R.RENT_LSTG_CN , R.HO_NO , R.RENT_TTL , R.ANN_NO , P.TTL AS ANN_TTL , TO_CHAR(P.RCRT_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCRT_BGNG_DT , TO_CHAR(P.RCRT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCRT_END_DT
, D.DONG_NO , D.FLOOR , D.HO , D.HO_STTS_CD , NVL(HC.CODE_NAME, D.HO_STTS_CD) AS HO_STTS_NM , D.IMAGE_NO , D.PANO_IMAGE_NO
, U.DONG_NM , U.FLOOR AS DONG_MAX_FLOOR , U.UNIT_CNT AS DONG_UNIT_CNT
, T.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE
, A.APT_CMPLEX_NO , A.APT_CMPLEX_NM , A.SIDO_NM , A.SIGUNGU_NM , A.EMD_NM , A.DOROJUSO , A.LAT_VAL , A.LON_VAL , A.UNIT_CNT , A.DONG_CNT , A.BLD_YR , A.CNSCO_NM , A.RPRSNT_IMG_FILE_NO
, IMG.GOOGLE_IDS AS RPRSNT_IMG_GOOGLE_IDS , IMG.CATS AS RPRSNT_IMG_CATS
FROM RENT_LISTING R
LEFT JOIN CENTER_ANN_BOARD_POST P ON P.ANN_NO = R.ANN_NO
INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL D ON R.HO_NO = D.HO_NO
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT U ON D.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO
LEFT JOIN APT_HO_TY T ON D.HO_TY_NO = T.HO_TY_NO AND U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = T.APT_CMPLEX_NO
INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX A ON U.APT_CMPLEX_NO = A.APT_CMPLEX_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT AF.FILE_GROUP_NO , LISTAGG(AF.GOOGLE_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY NVL(AF.FILE_SORT_ORDER, 999999), AF.REG_DT, AF.FILE_SAVE_UUID ) AS GOOGLE_IDS , LISTAGG(NVL(AF.CAT, 'NONE'), ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY NVL(AF.FILE_SORT_ORDER, 999999), AF.REG_DT, AF.FILE_SAVE_UUID ) AS CATS FROM ATTACH_FILE AF WHERE AF.GOOGLE_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY AF.FILE_GROUP_NO ) IMG ON IMG.FILE_GROUP_NO = A.IMG_FILE_NO
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE RC ON RC.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'RENT_TY' AND RC.CODE_NO_CD = R.RENT_TYPE_CD AND RC.USE_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE HC ON HC.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'HO_STTS' AND HC.CODE_NO_CD = D.HO_STTS_CD AND HC.USE_YN = 'Y'
WHERE A.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND R.ANN_NO IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY R.RENT_LSTG_NO DESC
